name: Cost Per Delivery by Transporter
query:
SELECT
    trip.transporter AS "Transporter:Link/Transporter:200",
    COUNT(DISTINCT tcr.name) AS "Trips Reconciled:Int:120",
    SUM(tcr.fuel_cost) AS "Total Fuel Cost:Currency/INR:140",
    SUM(tcr.toll_charges) AS "Total Toll Charges:Currency/INR:140",
    SUM(tcr.transporter_payout) AS "Total Transporter Payout:Currency/INR:180",
    SUM(tcr.total_stops) AS "Total Stops Delivered:Int:160",
    ROUND(AVG(tcr.cost_per_stop), 2) AS "Avg Cost Per Stop:Currency/INR:160"
FROM
    `tabTrip Cost Reconciliation` tcr
INNER JOIN
    `tabDelivery Trip` trip ON trip.name = tcr.delivery_trip
WHERE
    tcr.docstatus < 2
GROUP BY
    trip.transporter
ORDER BY
    AVG(tcr.cost_per_stop) DESC
